title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 06 2026
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 07/01/2026
Image reference: 2026-01-07_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-06-2026_img1.png
Bulkers: Values were mostly stable this week as we exited the holiday period. Handysize Sepetiba Bay (35,000 DWT, May 2005, Imabari) sold by Norsul Navegacao for USD 11.5 mil SS/DD Passed, VV Value USD 11.4 mil
Tankers: VV Tanker values have remained stable this week as a result of slower S&P activity over the last week
Suezmax Los Angeles Spirit (159,200 DWT, Jan 2007, Hyundai Samho HI) sold by Teekay Tankers for USD 35 mil, VV Value USD 34.27 mil
MR2 (Chemical/Product) Nord Superior (49,600 DWT, Jan 2015, STX Offshore) sold by Norden for USD 33.8 mil, VV Value USD 31.67 mil
Containers: With stable charter rates and limited sale activity, values have largely remained stable over the last week. A slight dip in older Handy Container and Sub Panamax vessels.
